since_last: 31% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.66%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.01% · BTC +0.18% · Gold -0.55% · Nasdaq100 -0.88%. 31% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.66%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.66%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -13.68%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.72%, ORCL +4.12%, AAPL +4.10%, GOOGL +3.52%, POWL +3.02%. Laggards: DELL -13.68%, SKHY -10.21%, MU -8.92%, AMBA -8.16%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.87% at $134.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
